name: eSim Simulation Bridge
description: One-click KiCad-to-eSim simulation bridge - automatic SPICE model linking, 7 analysis types, embedded waveform viewer with FFT, Bode plot, parametric sweep, and Python plot window integration
description_full:
eSim Simulation Bridge is a single KiCad 8.0 action plugin that reduces the entire KiCad-to-eSim/ngspice simulation workflow
            to one toolbar button click. It consists of three components: esim_bridge.py (v1.0.0) - core plugin handling netlist export, SPICE conversion, 
            7 analysis types (Transient, AC, DC, Operating Point, Noise, Transfer Function, Sensitivity), ngspice batch execution, and eSim project generation; 
            esim_spice_linker.py (v1.0.0) - SPICE Model Auto-Linker that scans eSim 2.5's built-in library (647 files) and resolves models via a 5-tier 
            scored matching algorithm; ngspiceSimulation package - eSim's Python plot window integrated dynamically via importlib. Features include an 
            embedded waveform viewer (FFT, Bode plot, cursor, parametric sweep, runtime stats panel), a 6-tab KicadToNgspiceDialog mirroring eSim's own interface, 
            and a preflight netlist checker. Validated on two FOSSEE Research Migration circuits: Three-Phase Bridge Rectifier (149.93 Hz ripple confirmed) and 
            Two-Stage Stagger-Tuned Amplifier (gain peaks at 139.4 kHz and 166.8 kHz confirmed).

author.name: Imran Farhat - FOSSEE Semester Long Internship Spring 2026, IIT Bombay
